masked_case_json.world_change: a non-cash-flow speculative asset has a strong cultural narrative and prior-cycle momentum, but no issuer cash flows, no earnings revisions, no contract award, no supply-demand filing that maps cleanly to corporate cash generation, and no falsifiable operating mechanism comparable to an equity thesis.

resolved_outcome_json.external_mechanism_check: Design negative control inspired by speculative-asset hindsight narratives. Correct behavior is no_trade under the trading-intelligence mandate unless a separate liquid-equity vehicle has a primary-source cash-flow mechanism. Do not expose this field to the model during decision generation.
